title: Wake in the Dark Room
summary: Ada wakes inside near-total darkness, oriented first by the clock glow and the bodily facts of waking before the room fully resolves.

narrative.newInfo: The reader enters Ada's consciousness through darkness, bodily perception, and the false-morning feel of shift-start waking.
narrative.dripHook: The room is not yet legible, but Ada's attention already is.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Voice and intimacy reward: the reader meets Ada through observation rather than exposition.
narrative.notes: Opening beat only. Keep the room mostly unresolved at first; let the clock glow and bodily sensation do the orientation work.

rewardTokens.description: Darkness, red clock glow, and bodily wakefulness create immediate inhabitable atmosphere.
Ada's observational rhythm establishes intimate trust before the room opens up.

modelUpdate.before: The scene has not yet resolved into named space.
modelUpdate.shift: Ada's attention orients the reader through clock glow and bodily fact.
modelUpdate.after: The reader is grounded in her perceptual frame before broader scene detail arrives.
